code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
